name_cn:
M13409 Black Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
As part of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue, the timeless Zippy coin purse is practical and playful, elevated for this season. Made from Monogram coated canvas with joyful rainbow tones that match the artist's signature pop palette. It features a silver zip closure and is divided into multiple compartments for coins, bills, and cards.
Size: 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm
